name: Market Research Brief
description: Research a niche, analyze competitors, and produce a comprehensive brief
icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 22 22' width='22' height='22' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><circle cx='11' cy='11' r='8'/><path d='M11 7v4l3 3'/></svg>
agentDescription: Autonomous research agent that gathers market intelligence, identifies competitors, and produces structured briefs.

skills.name: Pick Niche
skills.description: Define the target market or niche to research based on user input

skills.name: Find Competitors
skills.description: Search the web to identify key players and competitors in the niche

skills.name: Analyze Positioning
skills.description: Evaluate each competitor's positioning, pricing, and unique value props

skills.name: Write Report
skills.description: Compile findings into a structured market research brief document
